pi_items.source: setup_data.py lines 5-10 document 'Odoo's OFFICIAL DEMO DATA (bundled in hr/data/hr_demo.xml) provides the base dataset: - 20 employees: Jeffrey Kelly, Marc Demo, Ronnie Hart, Tina Williamson, Abigail Peterson, Audrey Peterson, Eli Lambert, Rachel Perry, Keith Byrd, Doris Cole, Ernest Reed, Toni Jimenez, Anita Oliver, Sharlene Rhodes, Randall Lewis, Jennie Fletcher, Paul Williams, Walter Horton, Beth Evans (+ Mitchell Admin)'; verified by multiple other task validated_pi.json files (create_employee, create_department, create_job_position, promotion_and_department_update tasks)

Official Odoo documentation (Odoo 17.0, 18.0, 19.0 documentation) confirms 'To-Do' (with hyphen) is the exact spelling of the standard activity type in Odoo; web search returned Odoo official documentation pages confirming this spelling; export_result.sh line 91 reads activity_type_id as [id, name] tuple where name would be 'To-Do'

ISO date format YYYY-MM-DD validated via Python datetime parsing; task.json description states '12/15/2025 (December 15, 2025)' which is equivalent to 2025-12-15; export_result.sh line 89 documents date_deadline field returns dates in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format
task.json description field (line 5) states 'Summary: Q4 Performance Review'; verifier.py line 54 expects this exact value

task.json description field (line 5) states 'Note: \'Discuss project contributions and set goals for next quarter\'' which contains all three keywords as substrings; verifier.py line 109 checks if each keyword is a substring of the note content (case-insensitive)

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on Odoo 17's official HR module demo data. Verified facts: (1) Target employee 'Marc Demo' is one of 20 employees in Odoo's official demo data (bundled in hr/data/hr_demo.xml), not synthetic data. (2) Activity type 'To-Do' is the correct and standard Odoo activity type name as documented in official Odoo 17+ documentation. (3) Expected due date is 2025-12-15 (December 15, 2025) in ISO YYYY-MM-DD format. (4) Expected activity summary is 'Q4 Performance Review'. (5) Expected note keywords are 'project contributions', 'goals', and 'next quarter', all present in the task description's note text. (6) Odoo runs at localhost:8069 with admin/admin credentials connecting to the odoo_hr database. (7) The verifier retrieves task result from /tmp/task_result.json exported by export_result.sh, comparing initial and final activity counts and validating activity details including type, summary, deadline, and note content.
